items.criterion: The PR implements KUSABI-CORE-MVP-MEMORY-BINDING-CLASSIFICATION-001 and does not substitute runtime remediation, local config mutation, release, or publish work.
All changed files remain within the Cell allowed paths, with no src, package, workflow, deploy, local config, DB content, docs/v2, schema, fixture, runner, branch protection, or ruleset edits.
The classification artifact cites the #228 operator evidence and records the 2026-06-30 binding snapshot without storing memory text.
The FX SQLite exception is bounded to tsumiage-claude and tsumiage-codex and does not close unrelated SQLite bindings.
The current eight explicit SQLite bindings remain listed as pending owner/operator classification unless explicitly resolved.
Low/no-count PostgreSQL bindings are classified as smoke-needed or inactive-needed rather than silently remediated.
The next step is identified as an operator smoke evidence Cell, not a runtime implementation or release-claim PR.
Diff checks and changed YAML/JSON parse evidence are present and match the reported scope.
The PR does not authorize backend parity, common DB completion, UAMP conformance, compliance, federation, release, publish, DLP, zero-leakage, or legal/regulatory claims.
